summary: Collects messy multilingual manager notes, repo-context preferences, and team availability before work is organized.
excerpt: Likely entry point when a ticket changes the intake shape, manager wording, or multilingual requirement capture.

summary: Primary execution board where ticket grouping, status visibility, and progress emphasis are shown.
excerpt: Any ticket that changes workflow visibility, status behavior, or board presentation will likely touch this panel.

summary: Secondary ticket view that exposes the same work in a denser, analyst-friendly table format.
excerpt: Useful when a requirement affects business-readable ticket context, column visibility, or alternate review flows.

summary: Expanded ticket workspace where status, assignee, blocker detail, comments, and role-aware context are edited.
excerpt: A likely impact surface whenever a ticket changes delivery detail, blocker management, or role-specific presentation.

summary: Owns the reassignment-ready handover flow, suggested next owner, and saved ticket handover records.
excerpt: Relevant when a ticket involves continuity risk, unavailable teammates, or ownership transitions.

summary: Role-based insights container for manager summaries, translation, handovers, and progress context.
excerpt: Tickets that change how work is summarized or explained across manager, analyst, and developer views likely affect this file.

summary: Perspective-switching translation flow for manager notes and ticket summaries across business and technical language.
excerpt: Good match when the ticket references multilingual notes, business-to-technical wording, or normalization.

summary: Generates and renders role-aware progress summaries using live project, ticket, team, and comment state.
excerpt: Likely impacted when delivery status, manager reporting, or summary logic changes.

summary: Local JSON-backed repository for projects, team members, tickets, comments, handovers, and repo summaries.
excerpt: Core persistence layer whenever a feature changes ticket data shape, local records, or backend CRUD behavior.

summary: Shared request and response typing for organize, translate, progress summary, handover, and future AI flows.
excerpt: Useful when a ticket changes AI payload shape, validation, or shared frontend-backend contracts.
